name: llm-token-optimization-stack
install_doc: Docs-only — see README.md for per-tool install instructions (RTK, th0th, Caveman, ContextGate, token-optimizer-mcp)
notes: Zero-code documentation-only repo (~0 original implementation). Curates a 5-layer stack of third-party tools: Layer 1 = RTK (CLI proxy, 60-90%), Layer 2 = th0th (semantic search MCP server returning top 3-5 files, 98%), Layer 3 = Caveman (system-prompt terse-output instructions, 70%), Layer 4 = ContextGate (YAML-profile API-response field stripper, 60-90%), Layer 5 = token-optimizer-mcp (MCP caching/dedup, 95%). Claims 80% total token reduction and 80% fewer hallucinations with benchmarks self-reported. No original compression code. Targets Claude Code + OpenCode. CACHE-SAFETY: varies per tool (RTK = cache-safe hook proxy; th0th = selective context injection = cache-safe; Caveman = system prompt injection = cache-breaking on first turn only; ContextGate = middleware field stripping = cache-safe; token-optimizer-mcp = dedup cache = cache-safe).
